name: Level Layout Fixes & Boss Rebalancing
theme: Fix broken stages (1-1, 1-2), tune all boss vulnerability windows and HP to difficulty curve, fix boss arenas
features: F25: Difficulty Curve Rebalancing (level fixes + boss tuning)

criteria.description: Elder Shroomba (Stage 1-1) vulnerability window increased to 3.0 seconds (180 frames) in phase 1
testSteps: Verify actual value is >= 3.0 seconds and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: Stage 1-1 vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS with actual >= 3.0s

criteria.description: All World 1 bosses (1-1, 1-2, 1-3) have vulnerability windows of 3.0 seconds (180 frames)
testSteps: Verify all three report PASS with actual >= 3.0s
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 1 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 2 bosses (2-1, 2-2, 2-3) have vulnerability windows of 2.5 seconds (150 frames)
testSteps: Verify all three report PASS with actual >= 2.5s
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 2 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 3 bosses (3-1, 3-2, 3-3) have vulnerability windows of 2.0 seconds (120 frames)
testSteps: Verify all three report PASS with actual >= 2.0s
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 3 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 4 bosses (4-1, 4-2, 4-3) have vulnerability windows of 1.5 seconds (90 frames)
testSteps: Verify all three report PASS with actual >= 1.5s
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 4 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: The Architect (Stage 5-1) has vulnerability window of 1.5 seconds (90 frames) base
criteria.threshold: Stage 5-1 vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass the vulnerability window check in the validator
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have vulnerabilityWindow.result = PASS

criteria.description: All World 1 boss HP values fall within 5-7 range (stages 1-1, 1-2, 1-3)
testSteps: Verify actual HP is between 5 and 7 inclusive and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 1 stages have bossHP.result = PASS with actual in [5, 7]

criteria.description: All World 2 boss HP values fall within 6-8 range (stages 2-1, 2-2, 2-3)
testSteps: Verify actual HP is between 6 and 8 inclusive and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 2 stages have bossHP.result = PASS with actual in [6, 8]

criteria.description: All World 3 boss HP values fall within 7-9 range (stages 3-1, 3-2, 3-3)
testSteps: Verify actual HP is between 7 and 9 inclusive and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 3 stages have bossHP.result = PASS with actual in [7, 9]

criteria.description: All World 4 boss HP values fall within 7-11 range (stages 4-1, 4-2, 4-3)
testSteps: Verify actual HP is between 7 and 11 inclusive and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: All 3 World 4 stages have bossHP.result = PASS with actual in [7, 11]

criteria.description: The Architect (Stage 5-1) HP is exactly 19
testSteps: Verify actual HP is 19 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: Stage 5-1 bossHP.result = PASS with actual = 19

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass the boss HP check in the validator
testSteps: Count how many have difficultyResult.bossHP.result = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have bossHP.result = PASS

criteria.description: Every boss arena has at least 2 platforms for player positioning
testSteps: Verify all 13 stages report count >= 2 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have arenaResult.platforms.result = PASS with count >= 2

criteria.description: Every boss arena has an accessible entry point from the left side (ground-level walkable entry)
testSteps: Verify all 13 stages report result PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have arenaResult.entry.result = PASS

criteria.description: Every boss arena passes the enclosure check (solid walls on all 4 sides except entry)
testSteps: Verify all 13 stages report result PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have arenaResult.enclosure.result = PASS

criteria.description: Every boss arena is at least 15 tiles wide
testSteps: Verify all 13 stages report measured >= 15 and result is PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have arenaResult.minWidth.result = PASS

criteria.description: Boss X position is clamped to arena bounds — boss entities cannot move outside the arena horizontally
testSteps: Review boss update/movement code in enemies.js
Verify boss x position is clamped between arena left and right bounds each frame
Verify this applies to all boss types (elder_shroomba through architect)
criteria.threshold: Boss update logic includes explicit x-position clamping to arena bounds for all boss types

criteria.description: Boss resets to center of arena when player dies and respawns
testSteps: Review player death/respawn code and boss reset logic
Verify that on player death or respawn, the boss position is reset to the center of the arena
Verify boss health is reset and phase is reset to initial state
criteria.threshold: Boss position resets to arena center on player death/respawn, with health and phase reset

criteria.description: Stage 1-2 layout is passable — BFS path validation confirms a traversable path from spawn to boss
criteria.threshold: Stage 1-2 pathResult = PASS

criteria.description: Stage 1-2 wall-jump sections have widened gaps and safe landing platforms — no precision moves required for progression
testSteps: Review stage 1-2 level data in level.js
Verify wall-jump sections have gaps of at least 4 tiles width
Verify intermediate landing platforms exist between wall-jump sections
criteria.threshold: Stage 1-2 level data shows widened wall-jump sections with intermediate safe platforms

criteria.description: All 13 stages pass path validation after fixes
testSteps: Count how many have pathResult = PASS
criteria.threshold: 13/13 stages have pathResult = PASS

criteria.description: Boss vulnerability windows are set via a per-world configuration, not hardcoded per boss individually
testSteps: Review boss spawning/configuration code in enemies.js
Verify vulnerability window durations are derived from the world number or a per-world lookup table
Verify World 1 = 180 frames, World 2 = 150, World 3 = 120, World 4 = 90, Citadel = 90
criteria.threshold: Vulnerability windows are configured via a world-based lookup or parameter, with correct per-world frame values

criteria.description: All arena checks pass across all 13 stages — arenaResult has 0 FAIL results
testSteps: Check top-level categoryCounts or iterate arenaResult across all stages
criteria.threshold: Arena category: 0 FAIL out of 52 checks (13 stages × 4 checks)

criteria.description: Boss vulnerability and HP checks all pass — difficultyResult.vulnerabilityWindow and difficultyResult.bossHP have 0 FAIL results across all 13 stages
testSteps: Iterate all 13 stages, check vulnerabilityWindow.result and bossHP.result
Count total FAIL for these two sub-checks
criteria.threshold: 0 FAIL across all 26 boss-related difficulty checks (13 vuln + 13 HP)

criteria.description: Game still runs at 60fps after level and boss modifications
testSteps: Load the game, enter a stage
criteria.threshold: FPS >= 55 during normal gameplay

criteria.description: Validator still produces results for all 13 stages with pathResult, arenaResult, and difficultyResult
testSteps: Verify each stage has pathResult, arenaResult, and difficultyResult
criteria.threshold: 13 stages, each with all 3 result sections

criteria.description: World map still shows all 13 stages across 5 worlds with correct progression
testSteps: Access WorldMap.nodes or equivalent world map data
Verify 13 stage nodes exist across worlds 1-5
Verify stage ordering and unlock progression are intact
criteria.threshold: WorldMap has 13 nodes with correct world/stage assignments

criteria.description: Debug overlay still opens with D key on title screen and shows all validation categories (PATH/ARENA/DIFF)
testSteps: On title screen press D to open overlay
Verify all 3 categories (PATH, ARENA, DIFF) are visible per stage
criteria.threshold: Debug overlay opens, shows PATH/ARENA/DIFF badges for each stage, closes with Escape

criteria.description: Player movement, combat, and core gameplay systems are unaffected by boss/level changes
testSteps: Verify Player object exists with movement and combat methods
Verify Physics, Input, Camera, Renderer systems are functional
Enter a stage and verify player can move and attack
criteria.threshold: All core gameplay systems functional — player moves, jumps, attacks normally

outOfScope: Minimum platform width enforcement for non-boss areas (Sprint 16)
Full validation pass achieving 100% PASS on all categories (Sprint 16 — density/hazard/platform fixes)
notes: This sprint modifies actual game data (boss configurations in enemies.js, level layouts in level.js, and boss arena tile data). Unlike Sprint 14 which only added read-only validation, Sprint 15 makes gameplay-affecting changes. The validator from Sprint 14 serves as the automated test suite — all boss-related checks (vulnerability windows, HP, arena checks) must PASS after changes. Enemy density, hazard percentage, and platform width checks may still FAIL as those are Sprint 16 scope. The key deliverable is that boss fights are properly balanced per the difficulty curve and all arenas are structurally sound.
